home.seoTitle: Juan Camilo Salazar | Full Stack Developer, AI & Web Specialist
home.seoDescription: Boost your business with advanced tech solutions. Modern web development with React/Next.js and AI Agents for sales automation and 24/7 customer engagement.
home.bio: Software developer passionate about technological innovation. Expert in building web and mobile applications using modern technologies like Next.js, React, Node.js, .NET and SQL databases. With experience on cloud platforms like Azure and AWS, I specialize in building scalable, secure and high-performance solutions.
home.highlight1Text: Building professional software for companies and startups
home.highlight2Text: Modern stack for high-performance frontend and backend
home.highlight4Text: React Native, e-commerce, admin panels and automation
home.ctaText: Let's talk about how I can help you build quality software that makes a difference.

blog.seoDescription: Articles and tutorials on Next.js, React, .NET, process automation, RPA and the latest trends in modern web development.
blog.title: Articles

aiSection.title: Automate your business with
aiSection.description: 24/7 customer service, autopilot lead qualification and optimized operational processes. We implement Artificial Intelligence tailored to your company's challenges.

webDevSection.title: Websites that
webDevSection.description: We don't just build beautiful websites; we develop high-performance platforms. Perfect SEO optimization, ultra-fast load times and UX/UI design crafted to maximize your business conversions.

projectsPage.title: Projects
projectsPage.seoDescription: Explore my featured projects: web apps with Next.js, React Native, .NET, medical platforms, booking engines and real estate management systems.

app_fruver.title: Fruver App — Inventory & Sales Control
app_fruver.description: Android app for produce stores: inventory control, sales tracking and real-time profit monitoring. Built with React Native and SQLite.

colegio_san_justino.title: San Justino School
colegio_san_justino.description: Modern institutional website for San Justino School. Includes academic information, news, events and direct contact for the school community.

velmax_consultorios.title: Velmax Medical Offices
velmax_consultorios.description: Comprehensive informational medical platform for Velmax Medical Offices in Berazategui. Includes directory, specialties and online appointment booking.

nice_gradient.title: Nice Gradient - AI-Powered Gradients
nice_gradient.description: AI-powered gradient generator built with Next.js 14. Curated gradient collection, visual editor and CSS/PNG export.

dr_machado_diagnostics.title: Dr. Cristian Machado - Medical Website
dr_machado_diagnostics.description: Professional medical website with SEO optimization for Dr. Cristian Machado, advanced radiology specialist in Buenos Aires.

luxury_booking_engine.title: Booking Engine - Yachts & Apartments
luxury_booking_engine.description: High-end (Dark Mode) Next.js platform for exclusive bookings of luxury apartments and private yachts with secure payments.

sistema_gestion_inmobiliaria.title: Real Estate Management System
sistema_gestion_inmobiliaria.description: Real estate platform: manage properties, pricing and users with a .NET backend (Clean Architecture) and a modern Next.js frontend.

aplicacion_movil_para_restaurantes.title: Mobile App for Restaurants
aplicacion_movil_para_restaurantes.description: Mobile app for restaurants, built with React Native; this app lets users subscribe to a newsletter.

ecommerce_mercadolibre.title: MercadoLibre E-commerce Clone
ecommerce_mercadolibre.description: MercadoLibre clone built with JavaScript, allowing interaction with sections to browse products and categories.

tarjeta_glasmorfismo.title: Animated Card with Glassmorphism Style
tarjeta_glasmorfismo.description: Interactive CSS card for selling shoes; it changes color depending on the shoe selected.

landing_parallax.title: Landing Page with Parallax Effect
landing_parallax.description: Landing page designed with a modern parallax effect formed by illustrations of a canyon in a desert at night.

calculadora_react_native.title: React Native Calculator
calculadora_react_native.description: Calculator built with React Native, featuring a modern design and dark mode to improve the user experience when performing basic math operations.

clon_chatgpt.title: ChatGPT Clone with Next.js
clon_chatgpt.description: ChatGPT clone built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, enabling interaction with a response-generating chatbot through OpenAI's GPT-3 API.

banner.tagline: Software development specialist — let's take your projects to the next level.

creativeSection.title: Visual Impact and Unique Experiences
creativeSection.description: We transform ideas into amazing interfaces. We develop websites with vibrant designs, fluid micro-interactions and cutting-edge aesthetics to make your brand stand out.
